creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #4)

Hello Michael,

Sure that is acceptable and I'm not insecure about maintainer authenticy.
I'm trying to deal with this situation the best I can with bugzilla.

Ok, in this situation or in case of doubt we can put a 'maintainer-feedback -> michaelo@apache.org', (maintainer) and then you can approve that request. This way this operation will be recorded here but unfortunately this method doesn't work because michaelo@apache.org is not registered on bugzilla.
